title: Act 1 - Part 3 - The Legend of Heroes: Trails of Cold Steel II Walkthrough
markdown:
### December 9

* * *

Select your party members. By now, if you've been fishing, you should have ranked up. You can obtain a **new fishing rod from Annabelle**, who is at the general store. Make your preparations and exit town via Ymir Valley. Choose two members from Class VII and one guest character (Claire, Sharon, or Toval) to accompany you. Once the decision is made, you won't have the option to change your party members. This is the only segment in the game where you can use Sharon. If you don't bring her along, you'll miss this chance until you start a new playthrough.

\- Advertisement -

A recommended party would include Alisa and Sharon since Sharon possesses some formidable crafts, and Alisa can serve as a CP battery, making them a very strong pair.

**Ebel Highway**

[![Trails of cold steel ii ebel highway.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/7/72/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_ebel_highway.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_ebel_highway.png)

You will end up at Ebel Highway 2. Pick up the **Flame Tongue** quartz near Valimar. Then head directly to Legram by going south. The game won't let you fully explore Ebel Highway yet, so pick up the rest of the treasure chests later.

| Enemy Name | Item Drop 1 | Item Drop 2 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Rose Shroom | Crisp Onion | Clear Gelatin |
| Grass Pom | Fresh Herb | Hearty Powder |
| Greedy Reaper | Flaky Potato | Globby Fat |
| Coco Panda | U-Material | Groundbait |
| Yellow Wisp | Clear Gelatin | Globby Fat |
| Hell Rabbit | Red Beast Flesh | Globby Fat |
| Gordi Schnarr | Red Beast Flesh | U-Material |
| Goldcider | Chitinous Shell | U-Material |
| Crocodark | White Beast Flesh | U-Material |
| Treasure | Location |
| --- | --- |
| Flame Tongue | Ebel Highway 2 |
| Burn | Ebel Highway 2 (Accessible Later) |
| Celestial Balm |
| EP Charge II |
| Blue Scaled Mail | Ebel Highway 1 |
| EP Charge II |
| Tearal Balm |
| Grand Press |

**Legram**

[![Trails of cold steel ii legram.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/4/42/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_legram.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_legram.png)

| Book: Gamber Jack Reprint #4 | Purchase from the General Store. |
| --- | --- |
| Book: Gambler Jack II - Chapter 6 | Weiber: Aprikoze Inn |
| Recipe: Seafood Pilaf | Bem: Aprikoze Inn - Backdoor |
| Nightmare Tip |
| --- |
| Stacking | From this point onward, it becomes possible to do Parameter Stacking. Depending on the bosses you are to fight, different combinations will be used. For detailed references, check the Advance Strategy - Stacking (In-Depth) part of the Nightmare Strategies Section at the end of this guide. |
| Task Equipment | With Stacking available, you must begin keeping at all times specific pieces of armor/boots to fulfill particular purposes. In this case, keeping 1 or 2 Jackets for both genders and some Breeze and Cloud Shoes (all of them bought at Lake Lacrima), will begin to help you build your Task Equipment. |

Watch the event scene at the Bracer Guild. Then go to Aprikoze Inn and speak to Weiber behind the counter, he will give you a copy of **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 6**. Then take the back door to outside and speak to Old Man Bem, he will teach you the [Seafood Pilaf](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Recipe_List#Seafood_Pilaf "walkthrough/Recipe List") recipe. Then head to the general store and purchase **Gambler Jack Reprint #4**, and stock up on new equipment. You could also find some of the Thors Academy students in Legram, there is **Vivi** at the Church, and **Casper** at the Training School. If you go to the harbor, you can find a fishing spot near Klaus. When you are ready, speak to Klaus, this will take you Lohengrin Castle. Climb up the hill and go inside Lohengrin Castle, you will fight a boss shortly after.

|  |
| --- |
| Zelvenom | HP: 45225 | Item Drop: None |
| Elemental Efficacy | 110, 100, 90, 100, 100, 100, 140 |
| Unbalance Efficacy | Slash: ★★★☆ Thrust: ★☆☆☆ Pierce: ★★☆☆ Strike:★☆☆☆ |
| Boss Skills | Poison Breath. Area (L). Inflicts Poison.Tail Swipe. Area (L). Push back. |
| This boss is quite easy compared to what you have previously fought. The boss has a strong area attack skill that can cause poison. However, you should able to defeat this boss before it becomes a hassle. Since the boss has a very poor slash resistant, you can easily deal a lot of damage to it with a Slash type character like Laura and Rean. The boss is also weak against Mirage arts, which Emma has already equipped. Status ailments also work pretty well against this boss. If Sharon is on your party, this boss will become super easy, because she has an area healing craft that remove all status ailments and high damage crafts. |

Afterwards, you will watch an event scene then Laura and Emma will join your party. Now head to the Bracer Guild located at the southeast area of town. Speak to Miles, he will hand you some side quests.

####  [![SubquestCS2.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/3/3d/SubquestCS2.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:SubquestCS2.png) Side Quest: Arseid School Bout 2

| Quest Name | Arseid School Bout 2 / 続 - 門下生との手合わせ |
| --- | --- |
| Go to the Arseid School Training Hall and speak to Klaus or Gaveli at the arena. Members of the Arseid School wants a rematch. Select the first choice to fight them in a duel. Rean and Laura will be automatically included in your party. Select two other members to bring with you. Note: *You cannot use guest characters for this fight.BossHPElemental EfficacyItem DropSlashTrustPierceStrikeFritz36352 (Normal)100, 100, 100, 100N/A★★☆☆★★☆☆★★☆☆★★☆☆Ares27440 (Normal)100, 100, 100, 100N/A★★☆☆★★☆☆★★☆☆★★☆☆Gaveli36707 (Normal)100, 100, 100, 100N/A★★☆☆★★☆☆★★☆☆★★☆☆Datt27440 (Normal)100, 100, 100, 100N/A★★☆☆★★☆☆★★☆☆★★☆☆This boss fight can be easy or tough. Each student is very weak against status ailments, Laura has a good chance of causing faint on them and with Rean's Gale, you pretty much Seal them to prevent them from doing any action. The students are also easily blind. So if you have some way of inflicting those status ailments, then use it on them. If the student HP gets low, they will be starting using this buff that will heal them and boost their strength greatly. During this phase, it can get really dangerous if they use their area skills it can do over 5000 damage. You could be instantly K.O.if you multiple students using the same skill on you. You can cheese through this fight by using your S-Craft with everyone, but you might want to drag this battle out if you intend on analyzing them.Afterwards you will be rewarded with a Heal quartz. | Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike | Fritz | 36352 (Normal) | 100, 100, 100, 100 | N/A | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | Ares | 27440 (Normal) | 100, 100, 100, 100 | N/A | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | Gaveli | 36707 (Normal) | 100, 100, 100, 100 | N/A | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | Datt | 27440 (Normal) | 100, 100, 100, 100 | N/A | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | This boss fight can be easy or tough. Each student is very weak against status ailments, Laura has a good chance of causing faint on them and with Rean's Gale, you pretty much Seal them to prevent them from doing any action. The students are also easily blind. So if you have some way of inflicting those status ailments, then use it on them. If the student HP gets low, they will be starting using this buff that will heal them and boost their strength greatly. During this phase, it can get really dangerous if they use their area skills it can do over 5000 damage. You could be instantly K.O.if you multiple students using the same skill on you. You can cheese through this fight by using your S-Craft with everyone, but you might want to drag this battle out if you intend on analyzing them. |
| Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| Fritz | 36352 (Normal) | 100, 100, 100, 100 | N/A | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ |
| Ares | 27440 (Normal) | 100, 100, 100, 100 | N/A | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ |
| Gaveli | 36707 (Normal) | 100, 100, 100, 100 | N/A | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ |
| Datt | 27440 (Normal) | 100, 100, 100, 100 | N/A | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ |
| This boss fight can be easy or tough. Each student is very weak against status ailments, Laura has a good chance of causing faint on them and with Rean's Gale, you pretty much Seal them to prevent them from doing any action. The students are also easily blind. So if you have some way of inflicting those status ailments, then use it on them. If the student HP gets low, they will be starting using this buff that will heal them and boost their strength greatly. During this phase, it can get really dangerous if they use their area skills it can do over 5000 damage. You could be instantly K.O.if you multiple students using the same skill on you. You can cheese through this fight by using your S-Craft with everyone, but you might want to drag this battle out if you intend on analyzing them. |
| Client | Gaveli |
| Reward | Heal, 1500 Mira, 4 AP |

####  [![SubquestCS2.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/3/3d/SubquestCS2.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:SubquestCS2.png) Side Quest: Ebel Rebel

| Quest Name | Ebel Rebel / エベル街道の手配魔獣 |
| --- | --- |
| Head town through Ebel Highway. You will find the quest monster located at Ebel Highway 2 at the very north area near the entrance of Ebel Highway 3. Before you fight this boss, it is highly recommended you are all equipped with a faint resistant accessory before you start this fight.BossHPElemental EfficacyItem DropSlashTrustPierceStrikeGordi Schnarr G98467 (Normal)120, 100, 140, 100, 100, 100, 100N/A★★☆☆★☆☆☆★☆☆☆★☆☆☆Boss SkillsSlam. Area (M). Inflicts Faint.Roar. Heal + Str/Spd 50%.Charge Slam. Takes 2 turns to activate. Inflicts Faint. Can be Cancelled.Suggested FormationSpread 1, Spread 2This boss has a ton of HP, it is also crazy strong. The boss will use a skill called drumming which will heal itself and greatly buff it's attack, defense, and speed. Allowing it to strike you multiple times, this means the boss can wipe your party fast. Not only does it hit hard, but it can also cause faint on your party with each attack. The worst part is when the bosses buff is about to expire it will use a skill called Hard Hit which can deal nearly 7000 damage to each member which makes this boss harder than anything you have encountered so far. The most effective way of killing this boss is to rely on flame type arts. It does the most amount of damage without using Crafts. You can also use Overdrive for an instant magic cast. Once you take out about half its HP, you can have your party spam their S-Craft before the boss has a chance to heal itself from its buff.When you defeat the boss, the game will give you the option to instantly go back to Legram to report the status. Go back and report to Miles at the Bracer Guild to finish the quest. | Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike | Gordi Schnarr G | 98467 (Normal) | 120, 100, 140, 100, 100, 100, 100 | N/A | ★★☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | Boss Skills | Slam. Area (M). Inflicts Faint.Roar. Heal + Str/Spd 50%.Charge Slam. Takes 2 turns to activate. Inflicts Faint. Can be Cancelled. | Suggested Formation | Spread 1, Spread 2 | This boss has a ton of HP, it is also crazy strong. The boss will use a skill called drumming which will heal itself and greatly buff it's attack, defense, and speed. Allowing it to strike you multiple times, this means the boss can wipe your party fast. Not only does it hit hard, but it can also cause faint on your party with each attack. The worst part is when the bosses buff is about to expire it will use a skill called Hard Hit which can deal nearly 7000 damage to each member which makes this boss harder than anything you have encountered so far. The most effective way of killing this boss is to rely on flame type arts. It does the most amount of damage without using Crafts. You can also use Overdrive for an instant magic cast. Once you take out about half its HP, you can have your party spam their S-Craft before the boss has a chance to heal itself from its buff. |
| Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| Gordi Schnarr G | 98467 (Normal) | 120, 100, 140, 100, 100, 100, 100 | N/A | ★★☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ |
| Boss Skills | Slam. Area (M). Inflicts Faint.Roar. Heal + Str/Spd 50%.Charge Slam. Takes 2 turns to activate. Inflicts Faint. Can be Cancelled. |
| Suggested Formation | Spread 1, Spread 2 |
| This boss has a ton of HP, it is also crazy strong. The boss will use a skill called drumming which will heal itself and greatly buff it's attack, defense, and speed. Allowing it to strike you multiple times, this means the boss can wipe your party fast. Not only does it hit hard, but it can also cause faint on your party with each attack. The worst part is when the bosses buff is about to expire it will use a skill called Hard Hit which can deal nearly 7000 damage to each member which makes this boss harder than anything you have encountered so far. The most effective way of killing this boss is to rely on flame type arts. It does the most amount of damage without using Crafts. You can also use Overdrive for an instant magic cast. Once you take out about half its HP, you can have your party spam their S-Craft before the boss has a chance to heal itself from its buff. |
| Client | Receptionist Miles |
| Reward | Sepith Mass x300, 1500 Mira, 4 AP |

After you have finished the two side quest above, go back to [Ebel Highway](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Act_1_Part_3#Ebel_Highway "walkthrough/Act 1 Part 3"). Then take north exit to Ebel Highway 2. You can examine Valimar for a short event. When you are ready, go to the northeast exit you will end up in Ebel Highway 3.

**Ebel Highway 3**

[![Trails of cold steel ii ebel highway 3.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/1/1e/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_ebel_highway_3.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_ebel_highway_3.png)

When you reach _Ebel Highway 3_, you should head for the northwest exit of the map, it will take you to _Aqua Shrine_. Clearing the Aqua Shrine will give you **three extra AP**. There is also a fishing spot near the waterfall by the Aqua Shrine.

| Treasure | Location |
| --- | --- |
| Celestial Balm | Ebel Highway 3 |
| Sepith x100 |
| Vanish |
| Dragon Vision |

**Aqua Shrine**

[![Trails of cold steel ii aqua shrine.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/2/2d/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_aqua_shrine.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_aqua_shrine.png)

Head downstairs, open the gate to enter the Aqua Shrine. Follow the west path until you reach to the **northwest corner**, you will find a **switch**. Press it to lower the water level. Then follow the west path. Go all the way to the east end to find a **Trial Chest for Laura and Emma**. Defeat the Trial Chest Boss and move on.

| Trial Chest Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| King Crysnetic | 33157 (Normal) | 100, 100, 100, 100, 100, 100, 100 | Shining R | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★★☆ |
| Crysnetic x4 | 6003 (Normal) | 100, 100, 100, 100, 100, 100, 100 | Coarse Rock Salt, U-Material | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★★☆ |
| This boss is pretty easy compare to some of the mini boss you have previously encountered. Every monster here can do an area attack skill that hits the entire map and inflict mute on your party. Use Laura's S-Craft or her Area Skills such as Brilliant Spin to wipe out the smaller mobs quickly. Once that's done, focus on the boss with Arts from Emma and attacks/crafts from Laura. |

Follow the south path, when you see a pair of stairs, take the north one path, you will find a monster chest at the center of the map. A **Scent** quartz is found inside. Now backtrack and go to the stairs at the south end, you will find a pair of **Blue Scaled Shoes** in a treasure box. Then follow all the way to the west side of the map to see a treasure chest and a switch. Open the chest to find an EP Charge II, then push the switch to raise the water up. Now take the path at the center, it should take to the northwest area to the boss.

| Monster Name | Item Drop 1 | Item Drop 2 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ice Drome | Healthy Liquor | Clear Gelatin |
| Crysnetic | Coarse Rock Salt | U-Material |
| Remoradark | White Beast Flesh | Clear Gelatin |
| Rup Kamuy | Red Beast Flesh | U-Material |
| Treasure | Location |
| --- | --- |
| Scent | Aqua Shrine |
| Blue Scaled Shoes |
| EP Charge II |
|  |
| --- |
| Tildawn Glacia x3 | HP: 43097 | Item Drop: Curia Balm, U-Material |
| Elemental Efficacy | 100, 0, 120, 100, 130, 130, 130 |
| Unbalance Efficacy | Slash: ★☆☆☆ Thrust: ★☆☆☆ Pierce: ★☆☆☆ Strike:★☆☆☆ |
| This fight is similar to the previous incarnation of Tildawns that you have previously encountered. It does exactly the same thing by spamming area attack skills, only this time it causes Mute. This fight will only bring a lot of trouble if you bring a whole party dependent on magic. Just make sure you cancel the boss's magic-casting by using a character with Impede on their crafts ability. If you want to cheese through this fight, you can use Rean, turn on Overdrive and use Motivate twice and have the entire party use their S-Craft. |

After you have defeated the boss, take the portal to exit out of Aqua Shrine. Collect all the treasure chest in Ebel Highway 3 if you haven't yet. Then take the **northeast exit** to **South Kreuzen Highway**.

**South Kreuzen Highway**

[![Trails of cold steel ii south kreuzen highway.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/5/59/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_south_kreuzen_highway.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_south_kreuzen_highway.png)

Keep moving, until you reach to the bridge for a short scene. Then head to the northwest corner to find a **fishing spot** at the north corner, and a **Hydro Cannon** quartz on the opposite end. Then continue north, and at the northeast corner you will find some **Sepith Mass** in a treasure chest. Then go to the north region of the map, when the path split, you can find a **Tearal Balm** on the west side, and a [Tauros](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Arts_and_Quartz#Tauros "walkthrough/Arts and Quartz") **Master Quartz** in the monster chest on the east side. Then return to the center path, and take the north exit to Bareahard.

Going to Bareahard will automatically advance the story, so make sure you have finish all the side quests from Legram before you enter.

| Monster Name | Item Drop 1 | Item Drop 2 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Platinum Bug | Chitinous Shell | U-Material |
| Time Snail | Clear Gelatin | Chitinous Shell |
| Goldflier | Hearty Powder | U-Material |
| Butterflier | Hearty Powder | U-Material |
| Calmiflier | Hearty Powder | U-Material |
| Treasure | Location |
| --- | --- |
| Hydro Cannon | South Kreuzen Highway |
| Sepith Mass x300 |
| Tearal Balm |
| Tauros |

**Bareahard**

[![Trails of cold steel ii bareahard.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/c/c5/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_bareahard.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_bareahard.png)

| Book: Gambler Jack Reprint #5, 6 | Purchase from Fortnum Books (Christie's Galleria 2F) |
| --- | --- |
| Book: Gambler Jack II - Chapter 7 | Saffron: Station Street (Near Christie's Galleria) |
| Book: Black Records #3 | Underground Waterway, after defeating the Abyss Drome. (Second Playthrough only) |
| Recipe: Fluffy Pancake | Calmin: Sorciere Restaurant. |
| Quest: Missin' Kitten | Speak to Eva at Central Plaza, near Underground Waterway. |
| Quest: St. Veronica's Tears | Speak to Sister Tatiana at Bareahard Cathedral |

There is a list of things for you to do in Bareahard, you should head to the clothing store (**Valenty Tailoring on Artisan's Street**), purchase the **Patterned Shirt** and the **Leather Sandal** equipment from there. The Patterned Shirt has the highest evasion bonus in the game (20%), which is the best equipment for players that want to make a dodge tank type character for later (Fie and Sharon can easily hit a 100% dodge rate with these making them immune to physical attacks for end game.) The Leather Sandal has a very high speed rating at this point of the game.

| Fresh Nightmare Mode Recommendations |
| --- |
| You can take the opportunity to purchase the following accessories from Turner's at Artisan Street:Red Pendulum x3 (You already have one from the 'A Cry For Help' hidden quest in Act 1 - Part 1)Green Pendulum x3 (One of them can be found in the Underground Waterway)Blue Pendulum x4Yellow Pendulum x4Dark Pendulum x4Each of these accessories costs 3,000 Mira, so you'll need a total of 54,000 Mira to buy them all. While it may take some time, you can use Sharon's cooking abilities to make Tri-colored Onigiri and sell them to gather the necessary Mira if you don't have enough from selling Sepith Mass. This will ensure that you have protection against all possible negative status effects and debuffs. |

Then go inside **Turner's Jewelers (Northwest building on Artisan's Street)** and speak to Colette. Leave, the building and take the north exit to the **Central Plaza**. Go inside the **Sorciere Restaurant** at the northeast corner. Then speak to Calmin by the Northwest counter, he will teach you the [Fluffy Pancake](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Recipe_List#Fluffy_Pancake "walkthrough/Recipe List") recipe. Exit out of the restaurant and take the east exit to **Station Street**. Speak to the maid, **Saffron** near Christie's Galleria, she will give you a copy of **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 7**. Then go inside **Christie's Galleria** and go to the second floor to book store (**Fortnum Books**) and purchase the **Gambler Jack Reprint #5**, **6**. Then speak to Theresia by the bench. Then work on the hidden side quest listed below.

####  [![QuesticonCS2.gif](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/c/c1/QuesticonCS2.gif)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:QuesticonCS2.gif) Hidden Quest: Missin' Kitten

* * *

[![Trails of cold steel ii missin kitten eva.jpg](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/3/3e/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_missin_kitten_eva.jpg)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_missin_kitten_eva.jpg)

Head to Bareahard's Central Plaza and then go downstairs near the Underground Waterway. Speak to Old Lady Eva, and choose the first option to offer your assistance.

After that, talk to the following NPCs, each of whom is marked with a green exclamation mark:

1.  **Hasan** - Located at the dining tables by Sorciere Restaurant in Central Plaza.
2.  **Biske** - Found on Artisan's Street near the entrance of South Kreuzen Highway.
3.  **Female Student** - Located on Station Street (at the center of the map).

Once you've spoken to the mentioned NPCs in Bareahard, exit the city by heading to North Kreuzen Highway. There, you will find the Missing Kitten at the north end of the map.

[![Trails of cold steel ii north kreuzen highway 1.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/4/40/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_north_kreuzen_highway_1.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_north_kreuzen_highway_1.png)

**Note:** You cannot access the Fishing Spot. The game will prevent you from reaching the northern side of the bridge. The Fishing Spot is not available until Act 2.

| Monster Name | Item Drop 1 | Item Drop 2 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Mantrap | Crisp Onion | Globby Fat |
| Egg Snake | Clear Gelatin | Chitinous Shell |
| Venus Mantrap | Globby Fat | U-Material |
| Treasure | Location |
| --- | --- |
| U-Material x5 | North Kreuzen Highway 1 |
| Petrify |

You'll be automatically taken back to Bareahard. Speak to the same cat once more to trigger a short scene with Celine.

| Client | Old Lady Eva |
| --- | --- |
| Reward and AP | Prismatic Cape, 2000 Mira, 4 AP |

[![MarginCS2Test.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/a/a4/MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

####  [![QuesticonCS2.gif](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/c/c1/QuesticonCS2.gif)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:QuesticonCS2.gif) Hidden Quest: St. Veronica's Tears

| Quest Name | St. Veronica's Tears / 聖女像の調査 [Hidden Quest] |
| --- | --- |
| Go to the Central Plaza part of town and enter the Bareahard Cathedral at the north end. Speak to Sister Tatiana, she's located in the west room. Select the first choice to help her. Leave the Cathedral and examine the statue at the center. Then go to Station Street and take the stairs on the east area to the entrance of the Underground Waterway.Follow the east path, and go all the way to the northwest corner. You will find a Green Pendulum in a treasure chest, and a switch. Press the switch to unlock the gate near the entrance. Go there to Underground Waterway 2. Go directly north to find some Sepith in a treasure chest. Then take the west path to the center of the map for a boss fight.BossHPElemental EfficacyItem DropSlashTrustPierceStrikeAbyss Drome88111 (Normal)100, 160, 160, 180, 80, 180, 160Clear Gelatin, Curia Balm★★★★☆☆☆☆☆☆☆☆☆☆☆☆Sludge Drome x76264 (Normal)100, 160, 160, 180, 80, 180, 160Clear Gelatin, Curia Balm★★★★☆☆☆☆☆☆☆☆☆☆☆☆There is a ton of Dromes here and they all can cast magic that deals a ton of damage. After you have finished the side quests, go to the **Noble District** and walk near the entrance of Duke Albarea Mansion for a short scene. After this visit the **Central Plaza** and go inside Sorciere Restaurant and speak to **Hammond** by the counter. Then head to Station Street and take the south exit to Bareahard Airport. Doing this will advance the story, so make sure you have finished all side activities from earlier.

**Bareahard Airport**

Head inside the airship, go downstairs from the southwest end of the map to the Hold, you will find a **Freeze** Quartz.

| Treasure | Location |
| --- | --- |
| Freeze | Airliner - Hold |

Return to the main floor, and take the stairs on your right to the 3F. Open the door directly in front of you to enter the Lounge room. Afterwards, you will play the racing mini game.

[![Trails of cold steel ii orbal bike controls.jpg](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/8/8b/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_orbal_bike_controls.jpg)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_orbal_bike_controls.jpg)

Beating Jusis on the race will give you **2 AP**. If you lose, you can retry again to get the bonus AP as long as you don't give up.

| Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Jusis | 19500 (Normal) | 100, 100, 100, 100 | N/A | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ |
| Boss Skills | Slash. Single. Normal attack.Stab. Delay/Impede +20 - Unbalance +20%Teara. Heal 6000 HP to self.Boost. Str/Spd/Ats +25% (3 Turns). |
| Jusis is a pretty easy boss, he's doesn't hit really and his accuracy is pretty poor. Once his health drops below 50%, he will start to act more aggressive. You can also motivate twice to buff your strength greatly and finish him off with an S-Craft. |

Afterwards, you will face another boss battle. If you manage to defeat Duvalie, you will get 3 Extra AP.

| Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| McBurn | 256800 (Normal) | 50, 50, 0, 50 | N/A | ★☆☆☆ | ☆☆☆☆ | ☆☆☆☆ | ☆☆☆☆ |
| Duvalie | 84208 (Normal) | 90, 90, 90, 90 | N/A | ☆☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ☆☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ |
| Boss Skills | McBurnFireball Throw. Area (M). Can inflict Burn.Fire Pillar. Area (L). Will kill your party in one shot. Only used when D is down or after 40 turns have passed.DuvalieFlame Slash. Area (M). Can inflict Burn.Wind Slash. Area (M). Can inflict Seal.Ice Slash. Area (M). Can inflict Freeze. |
| This is an unwinnable boss fight, but there is a bonus condition to earn 3 extra AP. You need to K.O. Duvalie before McBurn completely destroys you. Buff up your party's strength and spam all of your S-Craft on Duvalie. If anyone gets K.O. revive them with Zeram Powder to get a 100 CP and spam your S-Craft immediately until she is K.O. Make sure you also find the opportunity to scan them. |

If you manage to defeat Duvalie, you will get an alternative scene. Follow with a mech battle.

| Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Idle Stance | Attack Stance |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Hector | 150000 (Normal) | 100, 120, 120, 100 | N/A | B:★☆☆☆ | H:★★★☆ | A:★★☆☆ | B:★★★★ | H:☆☆☆☆ | A:☆☆☆☆ |
| Armored Vehicle NP-II | 72000 (Normal) | 120, 100, 100, 120 | N/A | B:☆☆☆☆ | N/A | N/A | B:★★★☆ | N/A | N/A |
| Focus on defeating the Armored Car first because it has the lowest HP of the two. The Armored car has no unbalance weakness during its idle stance, but during its attack phase it has a 3 star unbalance rating. Once you have taken out the Armored Car, focus on defeating Hector. Attack its head during its idle stance, and during its attack stance, focus on hitting the body. If your HP drops near 40000, use your support partner to heal. Use the picture here if you need a reference. |

The game will prompt you to save. Watch the event scene, until Rean is at the hot spring. You are given the choice to pick someone, select that person to have a special event and **600 Link Exp**.

### December 12

* * *

[![ReverieimpostexCS5.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/e/e3/ReverieimpostexCS5.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:ReverieimpostexCS5.png)

| Emma [Page 1] | Attend Emma's Bonding Event. |
| Fie [Page 1] | Attend Fie's Bonding Event. |
| Laura [Page 1] | Attend Laura's Bonding Event. (1st event) |
| Millium [Page 1] | Attend Millium's Bonding Event. |
| Sharon [Page 2] | Attend Sharon's Bonding Event. |
| Character | Location | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Alisa | Baron's Mansion 2F | Add Page 1 to Alisa's Character Profile.Link EXP +500 |
| Claire | Near Station | Link EXP +500 |
| Gaius | Septium Church | Gaius will Learn Hunter Wing.Link EXP +500 |
| Eliot | Phoenix Wings | Link EXP +500 |
| Emma | Tavern | Contained two Bonding EventsAdd Page 1 to Emma's Character Profile. *1st event onlyLink EXP +500 |
| Fie | Near Baron's Mansion | Add Page 1 to Fie's Character Profile.Link EXP +500 |

This is the only day in the game where you have double bonding events for certain characters. For this reason, you are given **7 bonding points**.

Attend the bonding events, doing Alisa, Emma, Fie, Laura, Millium and Sharon's event will add a page to their profiles. Attending Gaius' bonding event will teach him the Hunter Wing ability instead of reaching to level 75. There is also a new difficulty level added to the snowboard mini game. Clearing the course will get you the **Passion Leggings** accessory and a new snowboard. If you decide to head out to Ymir Valley, there is a monster called **Icicle Penguin** added to the area, scan that monster if you want the battle trophy.

**Note 1:** Guest characters (Claire, Sharon, Toval) with the **highest link EXP (Must be Link Level 3)** at the end of this act will give you a powerful accessory for Chapter 2.

| Character | Accessory | Effects |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Claire | Cerulean Hearts | ACC +100%, Critical Rate +10% |
| Sharon | Black Virtue | Attacks/Craft can cancel arts (90% chance). Delay +6 |
| Toval | Quick Calibur S | Reduce Arts cast time by 2/3 |

**Note 2:** If this is your second playthrough or higher, you can exchange for a Zemurian Ore Shard (Material to forge the strongest weapon) at the general store at the price of 50 U-Materials

Now go to the Tavern and speak to **Gerald** behind the counter, this will start a hidden quest.

####  [![QuesticonCS2.gif](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/c/c1/QuesticonCS2.gif)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:QuesticonCS2.gif) Hidden Quest: Stranger than Fishin

* * *

Head to the Tavern and speak to Gerald behind the counter. Accept his request and leave town by going to Ymir Valley, keep going until you reach Ymir Valley 2. Speak to Annabelle who is located at the center of the map. Now fish at the bridge, once you successfully catch the fish, there will be a boss battle.

| Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Icy Croaker | 68100 (Normal) | 120, 60, 160, 90 | N/A | ★☆☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ☆☆☆☆ | ★★★☆ |
| A really easy boss, because of it's poor faint and sleep resistance, you can easily inflict faint or sleep on it. The boss only has hit single targets, so there isn't anything to watch out for. |

Afterwards, you will be returned to town and awarded two quartz, effort and prankster which are helpful for cooking.

| Client | Gerald |
| --- | --- |
| Reward and AP | Effort, Prankster, 2000 Mira, 4 AP |

[![MarginCS2Test.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/a/a4/MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

When you have finished all the activities listed above save your game and head to your room to end the day. The game will accumulate all the AP you have earned, you will get an S-Rank if you manage to get a total of **41 AP**.

| Results | AP |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Reunited with Legram classmates | 5 |
| Reunited with Jusis | 8 |
| Won the race against Jusis | 2 |
| Defeated Duvalie | 3 |
| Found and explored the Aqua Shrine | 3 |
| Quest: Arseid School Bout 2 | 4 |
| Quest: Ebel Rebel | 4 |
| Quest: Missin' Kitten [Hidden] | 4 |
| Quest: St. Veronica's Tears [Hidden] | 4 |
| Quest: Stranger than Fishin' [Hidden] | 4 |
| Fought well against Rufus *Not listed | 3 |
|  |
| --- |
| Rufus | HP: 128640 | Item Drop: None |
| Elemental Efficacy | 90, 90, 90, 90 |
| Unbalance Efficacy | Slash: ☆☆☆☆ Thrust: ☆☆☆☆ Pierce: ☆☆☆☆ Strike:★☆☆☆ |
| This is an unwinnable boss fight, but to fulfill the bonus condition for the extra 3 AP, you must reduce the boss's HP to below 50% within 40 turns. The challenge lies in the boss's exceptionally high defense, which renders regular attacks almost ineffective. The most effective strategy is to enhance your party with Jusis's buffs and unleash a barrage of S-Crafts. If your CP is depleted, resort to using arts. Beware, if the boss manages to cast his arts, it can deal a devastating 17,000 damage to each party member, which will K.O. them in an instant. Therefore, it's crucial to have a character capable of canceling his art casting to prevent this issue. After inflicting a substantial amount of damage, the boss will employ his S-Craft to instantly decimate your entire party. |

Following this encounter, you'll engage in another mech battle, but it's also an unwinnable one. After this fight, the chapter will conclude.
